name: if_stages
query:
SELECT 
    s.stage_id,
    s.stage_name,

    (
        SELECT 
            CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 
                COUNT(CASE 
                    WHEN ROUND(o.availability * o.performance * o.quality, 2) < 0.70 THEN 1 
                    ELSE NULL 
                END)
            ELSE NULL END
        FROM if_assets a
        JOIN if_assets_oee o ON o.asset_id = a.asset_id
        WHERE a.stage_id = s.stage_id
    ) AS oee_alert_count,

    (
        SELECT 
            CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 
                COUNT(CASE 
                    WHEN ROUND(o.availability * o.performance * o.quality, 2) >= 0.70 
                     AND ROUND(o.availability * o.performance * o.quality, 2) < 0.85 THEN 1 
                    ELSE NULL 
                END)
            ELSE NULL END
        FROM if_assets a
        JOIN if_assets_oee o ON o.asset_id = a.asset_id
        WHERE a.stage_id = s.stage_id
    ) AS oee_warning_count,

    (
        SELECT 
            CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 
                COUNT(CASE 
                    WHEN ROUND(o.availability * o.performance * o.quality, 2) >= 0.85 THEN 1 
                    ELSE NULL 
                END)
            ELSE NULL END
        FROM if_assets a
        JOIN if_assets_oee o ON o.asset_id = a.asset_id
        WHERE a.stage_id = s.stage_id
    ) AS oee_efficient_count,

    (
        SELECT 
            CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 
                MAX(
                    CASE 
                        WHEN ROUND(o.availability * o.performance * o.quality, 2) < 0.70 THEN 2
                        WHEN ROUND(o.availability * o.performance * o.quality, 2) < 0.85 THEN 1
                        ELSE 0
                    END
                )
            ELSE NULL END
        FROM if_assets a
        JOIN if_assets_oee o ON o.asset_id = a.asset_id
        WHERE a.stage_id = s.stage_id
    ) AS oee_status_level,

    (
        SELECT 
            CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 
                ROUND(AVG(ROUND(o.availability * o.performance * o.quality, 2)), 2)
            ELSE NULL END
        FROM if_assets a
        JOIN if_assets_oee o ON o.asset_id = a.asset_id
        WHERE a.stage_id = s.stage_id
    ) AS stage_oee

FROM if_stages s
ORDER BY s.stage_id asc;
